item.title: adidas Vs Pace 2.0 Shoes Zapatillas Hombre Shadow Navy/Shadow Navy/Ftwr White 46 EU
item.description: Tienes adidas Vs Pace 2.0 Shoes Zapatillas Hombre Shadow Navy/Shadow Navy/Ftwr White 46 EU aqui! 🔎: Suela de goma de aspecto vulcanizado Tirador de tela en el talón Parte de nobuk sintético Horma clásica 🛒 Comprar!!! Check the price of this item in other countries: 🇬🇧 United Kingdom | 🇺🇸 USA | 🇩🇪 Germany | 🇪🇸 Spain | 🇫🇷 France | 🇮🇹 Italia | 🇦🇪 Arab Emirates | 🇨🇦 Canada | 🇧🇪 Belgium | 🇳🇱 Neederlands | 🇵🇱 Poland | 🇸🇪 Sweden |
